task_objective: Nail Art Promo Page & 6-View Fashion Layout - center inspiration with surrounding design views

structural_reference.focus: EXACT nail structural framework - nail shape, length, curvature, outline, proportions, spacing - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structural_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for nail design generation

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color system, texture, pattern or detailing, and overall style tone
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic elements to be applied onto the nail structure

workflow.step_1: Analyze Figure 2 inspiration + parse Figure 1 nail structure
workflow.step_2: Generate sketch → render from Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics, pixel-precise, NO structural deviation
workflow.step_3: Generate model hand wearing views + brand campaign, assemble diamond layout with premium atmosphere

outputs.center_inspiration: Figure 2 Inspiration - Original image at center with premium framing & glow. Label: 灵感溯源 INSPIRATION SOURCE
outputs.top_left: Sketch Design - Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics sketch. Label: 草图设计 SKETCH
outputs.top_right: Nail Render - High-fidelity render, realistic texture. Label: 美甲渲染 NAIL RENDER. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.left_view: Back of Hand - Model hand fingers spread, full nail design display. Label: 手背展示 BACK
outputs.right_view: Detail Closeup - Dutch angle nail close-up, pattern & craftsmanship. Label: 细节特写 DETAIL
outputs.bottom_campaign: Brand Campaign - Elegant hand editorial pose, stylish setting matching Figure 2 mood. Label: 品牌时尚 FASHION CAMPAIGN

output_requirements: Figure 1 nail structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise
All wear views nail design 100% identical to top_right render
Model hand: Asian/Caucasian/African, auto-adapted skin tone, consistent
SFW; realistic nail texture (gloss, matte, shimmer); consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Coherent lighting: nail highlights & shadows, ambient occlusion, consistent light direction
Premium atmosphere: Figure 2 color gradient bg, glow around center, cinematic vignette, unified color grading, luxury white space, editorial retouching
AI copywriting: Chinese-primary + English-secondary, series poetic title + inspiration analysis + nail spec + DNA mapping (icon-annotated), elegant typography with theme-matching decorative icons
